signals.raw:
Elon Musk Tweet Count Markets Trending on Polymarket | NO | MED confidence**

Polymarket's most active markets right now focus on **Elon Musk's tweet volumes**, such as "Elon Musk # tweets April 20 - April 22, 2026?" (e.g., "40-64" outcome) and "Elon Musk # tweets April 17 - April 24, 2026?", with the "1120-1159" range at **18-19% odds** across high-volume markets totaling over $22M in trading[2][
matched_markets: Will Trump name "Elon" or "Musk" in April?
